name: 401 Park
content: Located near Fenway and accessible by Green Line D trains, 401 Park has a wide variety of food options to choose from, along with being located in a massive art deco building that looks gorgeous in the sunset and boasts several shrubberies on the outside. Good place for lunch or dinner with coworkers or to hang out with friends. It was fairly busy when I visited on a weekday evening, but it wasn’t too difficult to find a table. Very safe bet if you don’t know what sort of food you want or don’t know how long you’ll be hanging out. I think there might be some retail stores here as well.
